_help: This file is YOUR control panel. 'hidden' = repos to hide everywhere (frontend + chatbot). 'pinned' = repos to show first, in this order. 'overrides' = your polished copy for a repo, used instead of GitHub's plain description. Any repo not mentioned here still shows automatically using its GitHub info. Matching is case-insensitive, so lowercase keys match repos of any case. Keys starting with _ are ignored by the code.

portfolio-ai.description: RAG-powered chatbot that answers questions about my portfolio using semantic search. Built with FastAPI, LangChain, FAISS, and OpenAI embeddings to retrieve context from resume PDFs and structured profile data. Auto-syncs its project knowledge from GitHub, with an admin panel to hide projects from both the site and the chatbot. Streams responses token-by-token; deployed on Render.

email-classifier.description: A layered FastAPI microservice that connects to Gmail over OAuth 2.0 and auto-labels inbox mail into a fixed six-class taxonomy. Fine-tuned a local DistilBERT classifier via knowledge distillation — using GPT-4o-mini as a teacher to bootstrap the dataset — running fully on-device so email content never leaves the machine. Diagnosed a failing minority class from the confusion matrix and applied inverse-frequency class weights, lifting macro-F1 from 0.67 to 0.95.

ai-codebase-tutor.description: A virtual senior engineer that ingests any GitHub repo and explains it. Combines hybrid BM25 + FAISS retrieval with cross-encoder reranking and AST-based graph traversal so answers cite the right code, an agentic tool-calling loop for multi-step questions, and a RAGAS-style evaluation harness to measure answer quality. FastAPI backend with streaming responses.

careroute.description: An AI agent that reads a patient's symptoms, works out which specialist they need, then calls tools to look up the patient's record and find the nearest matching doctors. Added a step limit and error handling so one failed tool call can't break the whole agent. A single provider-search function pulls from three sources (sample data, OpenStreetMap, or Google Places), normalizes them into one shape, and sorts by distance with specialty matches first.

rag-document-chatbot.description: Answers questions over any PDF — with sources. Built a modular pipeline using LangChain, MiniLM embeddings, and a FAISS vector store. Prompt guardrails via TinyLlama. MMR deduplication for retrieval quality. Persistent index, CLI interface, production-minded from day one.

email-spam-filter.description: End-to-end spam filter: TF-IDF n-grams + Logistic Regression with class balancing. Beats a Naive Bayes baseline through thoughtful feature engineering and regex preprocessing. Served in real time via a Flask API — not just a notebook, an actual product.

travel-ai.description: A hands-free travel planner you talk to: Whisper transcribes speech, a GPT-4o-mini / GPT-4o layer plans the itinerary, and text-to-speech reads it back. FastAPI backend. (Work in progress.)
